name: olloweditor-monorepo
description: Development commands for the OllowEditor monorepo.

scripts.check: npm run check:javascript && npm run check:npm && npm run check:python-frontend
scripts.check:npm: npm --prefix packages/npm run typecheck && npm --prefix packages/npm run build
scripts.check:python-frontend: npm --prefix packages/python run build && npm --prefix packages/python run typecheck && npm --prefix packages/python test && npm --prefix packages/python run verify:python-assets
